chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.182 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of main case 09.09.2024. Mr. Muhammad Naseeruddin, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi, Addl. Prosecutor General. Applicant along with his family members was arrested on 04.08.2021 travelling in a Toyota Corolla Car bearing Registration No.AUX-824, Engine No.Y266656, Chasis No.NZE-140-2081593, Model 2011 of white colour; hence FIR Crime No.320/2021, under section 6/9 CNS Act of P.S. Mochko, Karachi was registered and the said car was impounded. During investigation, the applicant was exonerated by the police, however, the trial was conducted against his family members. After full-fledged trial, his family members were acquitted by the trial Court vide judgment dated 07.04.2022. Thereafter, the applicant moved an application under section 517-A, Cr. P.C. for restoration of above car but the trial Court dismissed the same on the ground that already during the trial an application under section 516-A, Cr. P.C. was filed by the applicant, which was dismissed. We have heard the learned counsel for the parties. The case has already ended in acquittal of the family members of the applicant. The applicant is admitted owner of the vehicle and at the time of impounding the vehicle was found in possession thereof. No other applicant has come forward to claim the vehicle. In view of the above, this revision application is allowed. The applicant is restored possession of vehicle viz.

In view of the above, this revision application is allowed. The applicant is restored possession of vehicle viz. Toyota Corolla Car bearing Registration No.AUX-824, Engine No.Y266656, Chasis No.NZE-140-2081593, Model 2011 of white colour against surety of Rs.5,00,000/- for one year. If during one year no one come forward to claim the vehicle, the surety shall be discharged. The revision application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE hanif JUDGE
